def process_orders(orders: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    results = []
    for order in orders:
        items = [item for item in order["items"] if item["qty"] > 0]
        total = sum(item["price"] * item["qty"] for item in items)
        tags = {item["category"] for item in items}
        results.append({
            "order_id": order["id"],
            "total": total,
            "categories": list(tags),
        })
    return results

def analyze_logs(log_lines: list[str]) -> list[dict]:
    summaries = []
    for line in log_lines:
        parts = [p.strip() for p in line.split(",")]
        fields = {k: v for k, v in (p.split("=") for p in parts if "=" in p)}
        summaries.append(fields)
    return summaries

def transform_records(records: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    output = []
    for record in records:
        cleaned = {k: v.strip() for k, v in record.items() if v is not None}
        values = [v for v in cleaned.values() if isinstance(v, str)]
        output.append({"data": cleaned, "text_fields": values})
    return output
